detail.description: Anthony Seigler doubles (7) on a sharp fly ball to right fielder Jonny DeLuca. Tsung-Che Cheng scores.
Anthony Seigler singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Jonny DeLuca.
Anthony Seigler singles on a line drive to left fielder Chandler Simpson.
Anthony Seigler homers (1) on a fly ball to left field.
Anthony Seigler singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jasson Domínguez. Caleb Durbin to 2nd.
Anthony Seigler hits a ground-rule double (3) on a fly ball down the left-field line. Jarren Duran to 3rd.
Anthony Seigler doubles (2) on a line drive to left fielder Jake McCarthy. Marcelo Mayer scores.
Anthony Seigler singles on a line drive to center fielder Cole Carrigg.
Anthony Seigler singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jake McCarthy.
Anthony Seigler singles on a ground ball to right fielder Tyler Freeman.
Anthony Seigler singles on a line drive to left fielder Josh Lowe.
Anthony Seigler doubles (6) on a ground ball to right fielder Jo Adell.
Anthony Seigler homers (2) on a line drive to left field. Tsung-Che Cheng scores.
Anthony Seigler singles on a line drive to left fielder Juan Soto.
Anthony Seigler singles on a line drive to center fielder Tristan Peters.
Anthony Seigler singles on a ground ball to left fielder Connor Joe.
Anthony Seigler doubles (1) on a line drive to left fielder Cody Bellinger.
